characters.name: Gérard
characters.description: Gérardwas a human featured only in24H. He was the neighbour of the Goofs until he hijacked their ship. Gérard is both very friendly and very optimistic, potentially annoyingly so. He is receptive to Bud but obviously doesn't take him seriously about the statement that there are aliens in his house. Gérard could also be considered a handyman, always equipped with the necessary expertise or resources to deal with a problem, such as when he cleansed Bud's toilet, or when he was recruited to fix the SMTV. Gérard wears a plain white shirt with a yellow tie, black slacks, and brown shoes. His hair and moustache are brown. He is also fat. Gérard is both very friendly and very optimistic, potentially annoyingly so. He is receptive to Bud but obviously doesn't take him seriously about the statement that there are aliens in his house. characters.description: Panda Manga Panda Mangais the main antagonist of the episode "Manga Mania". He's an anthropomorphic anime-style panda who is the #1 star of manga. He's voiced by Charlie Adler.

characters.name: Stork Mom
characters.description: the Stork Mom is a minor character in Space goofs appearing in "Be My Baby". She is the mother of a baby stork who fell down the chimney and thinksEtnois his father. the Stork mom is first seen laying an egg on the chimney of the Space Goofs' House and was so pleased to see her baby but she notices the egg has peed and tells her baby to "Stay here while i go get some diapers" When etno was trying to get bud to move after he unknowingly paralyzed him, the egg suddenly rolled to his butt and hatched a baby stork which started to lick etno who keeps telling him to stop

characters.name: The Bats
characters.description: Characters from Space Goofs episode Bats in the Belfry who wreak havoc onto the Abandoned House which Candy shoos off later on in the episode when a Bat dumps a cigar into the Coffee.

characters.name: Zibouya
characters.description: Zibouyais an Indian belly dancer and a princess. She was also Etno's love interest. She appeared in season 2. She only appears in the episode "Bollywood Aliens" and her last appearance was in season 2 episode 52 "Welcome".  She is voiced by Kathryn Cressida. When Etno met Zibouya talking each other she talks about her fiance who never came back and she was still waiting him to get the milk. Her fiance's name is Vikash, When etno was trying to show zibouya of his alien form she turned very slowly but Vikash came in and Zibouya was surprised and happy to see her fiance. In the end of the episode, Vikash and Zibouya was going to get married but when Vikash spanked the elephant to take them in their wedding, they used the wrong elephant and they blast off to space. Etno was heartbroken that he could never see that princess again.
